fees_scholarship.response: For fees and scholarship details, please visit the official website.

scholarships.response:
Kinds of Scholarships:
1. Academic Scholarship (Merit-Based - based on 12th percentage)
2. Female Scholarship - 5%
3. Defence Scholarship - 5%
4. Diversity Scholarship - 10%
5. Domicile Scholarship - 10%

responses.id_card: You can apply for ID cards in the admin office.

admission.response: For admission, visit campus or apply through the official website.

accommodation.response: Hostel facility available for both girls and boys.

documents_required.response:
Required Details:
1. Personal: Name, DOB, Mobile, Email, Address
2. Academic: 10th, 12th, Stream, Graduation (for PG)
3. Documents: Photo, Aadhaar, Migration, TC, Character Certificate
4. Other: Category, Domicile
5. Entrance Exams: CUET (Optional), JEE (For B.Tech)

admission_process.response:
Admission Process:
1. Fill online application form
2. Upload document
3. Pay registration fee
4. Wait for confirmation
5. Pay admission fee

eligibility.response:
Eligibility:
BBA/BCA: 12th Pass
B.TECH: PCM required
MBA/MCA/M.TECH: Graduation required

college_info.response:
Location: Bell Road, Clement Town, Dehradun, Uttarakhand - 248002
Campus: Modern campus with green spaces
Facilities: Smart classrooms, labs, library, auditorium, placement cell, sports & gym

placements.response:
Top Recruiters: Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Adobe
Highest Package: ₹61.99 LPA
Average Package: ₹5 LPA

uniform.response:
Uniform Rules:
Monday & Thursday: Formal
Tuesday-Friday: Semi-formal
Saturday: Informal
